---
title: "Creating High Quality Products"
id: module-postprocessing
order: 3
summary: "The processing of aerial drone imagery is a complex procedure which is supported by both open source and closed source software."
module-goals:
  - module-goals-pp
materials:
  - material-hs-3
  - material-hs-4
  - activity-metashape-altum
activities:
  - activity-metashape-wf-10
  - activity-metashape-wf-11
  - activity-usecase-1
  - activity-odm-09
  - activity-odm-10
  - activity-odm-15
  - activity-fw-21
assessments:
  - pp-assessment
labels:
  - Einführung
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/Postprocessing/module-postprocessing.md"
title-block-banner: ../images/module-postprocessing/odm.png
title-block-banner-color: black

listing:
  - id: module-module-goals
    contents: "../module-goals/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-postprocessing
      heading: "Goals"

  - id: module-materials
    contents: "../materials/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-postprocessing
      heading: "Materials"

  - id: module-activities
    contents: "../activities/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-postprocessing
      heading: "Activities"

  - id: module-assessments
    contents: "../assessments/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: module-postprocessing
      heading: "Assessments"
---

This module bundles the processing workflow for creating high-quality outputs from aerial imagery.

::: {#module-module-goals}
:::

::: {#module-materials}
:::

::: {#module-activities}
:::

::: {#module-assessments}
:::
